exploration.title: Ingestion Security + Secret/PII Governance
openQuestions: Scope boundary — one ingestion-security wedge vs split content-security gate + shared secret-governance spine
First slice — which net-new capability to build first
Package placement — secret resolver + per-user vault home (platform-adjacent, NOT @beep/identity)
Package placement — content-security modules, HTML sanitizer, and scored-findings home
Build-vs-buy — reimplement-not-copy (x-ray on pdf.js, deterministic injection, Presidio contract)
Vendor/auth — 1Password first provider + ordered-resolution placeholder-rejection mechanism
Per-user vault cryptography — AES-256-GCM per-user subkeys vs XChaCha20-Poly1305 + KDF floor
SSRF — extend SafeRemoteHost range table + net-new GuardedHttpClient connect-time layer
